blockers: All 50 batch013 rows are TOPSHP topmark/board variants and still render as plain circles rather than the required square-board/diamond-board topmark silhouettes.
Rows with vertical, horizontal, S-57 pattern-6, squared/checkered, or border-stripe colour semantics do not encode the required internal pattern or colour order.
No row in this slice is human-final approved; all 50 need repair before final approval can be considered.

verdicts.expected: TOPSHP17 must render as the vertical square-board topmark shown by the OpenCPN/Chart No.1 reference witnesses, preserving the required colour sequence orange, black, orange using vertical bands/stripes in the listed colour order.
verdicts.judge_comments: Fail for first-pass visual parity: topmark class is present only as a generic circle, but the provider/reference witnesses require a board-shaped topmark with exact orientation and color-order semantics. Not final-approved.
verdicts.observed: Helm renders a plain orange circle with a black outline; it has no square-board/diamond-board topmark silhouette, no board orientation, and no internal band/checker detail.
verdicts.required_change: Replace the circular placeholder with the vertical square-board topmark reference shape and encode the required colour order/pattern: orange, black, orange using vertical bands/stripes in the listed colour order.
